scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend,agent -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/frontend" "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/agent"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/agent && npm run build -w apps/frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,agent,frontend "npm run start -w apps/backend" "npm run start -w apps/agent" "npm run start -w apps/frontend"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/backend && npm run typecheck -w apps/agent && npm run typecheck -w apps/frontend
